clusters.label: Street lights non-functional in Banganga lanes
clusters.severity_rationale: Ward has 54% connectivity and 'low' streetlight density in IMC ward-infra data; night-safety complaints corroborate the dark-spot mapping across inner lanes.

complaints.text: स्ट्रीट लाइट तीन हफ्ते से खराब है, रात में अंधेरा रहता है
Street lights not working near the main road, very unsafe at night
गली नंबर 4 में एक भी लाइट नहीं जल रही
Poles are there but no light for weeks
रात को बच्चों का बाहर निकलना मुश्किल है अंधेरे की वजह से

related.label: Chain-snatching and theft incidents at night
related.explanation: Dark streets from non-functional lighting correlate with the night-time safety complaints clustered a few lanes away.

clusters.label: Primary school building damaged, girls dropping out — Banganga
clusters.severity_rationale: UDISE+ 2024-25 flags 22% ward dropout vs 5-6% in planned wards; complaints cite closed classrooms and no girls' toilet, the documented dropout drivers.

complaints.text: स्कूल की छत टपकती है, बरसात में क्लास बंद रहती है
There is no separate toilet for girls, many have stopped coming
बच्चों को दूसरे वार्ड के स्कूल भेजना पड़ रहा है

clusters.label: Chain-snatching and theft incidents at night
clusters.severity_rationale: Cluster of night-time theft reports concentrated in the same low-lit corridor; corroborated by the streetlight dark-spot cluster.

complaints.text: रात को चेन स्नैचिंग की घटना हुई मेन रोड पर
Two phone snatching cases last week after dark

related.label: Street lights non-functional in Banganga lanes
related.explanation: The theft incidents track the same unlit stretch flagged in the streetlight cluster.

clusters.label: Potholes and broken road surface — Scheme 54, Vijay Nagar
clusters.severity_rationale: Recurring pothole reports along the Scheme 54 corridor; monsoon worsening but no injury reports, kept at medium.

complaints.text: Huge potholes on the Scheme 54 main road, two-wheelers keep skidding
बारिश में सड़क पूरी तरह टूट गई है

clusters.label: Blocked drains and stagnant water — Musakhedi nala
clusters.severity_rationale: Stagnant water along the main nala; overlaps the ward's dengue reports and low PHC density (0.3 per 10k).

complaints.text: नाला जाम है, गंदा पानी सड़क पर भरा रहता है
Mosquitoes everywhere, two dengue cases in our lane

clusters.label: Narmada water supply irregular — Palasia
clusters.severity_rationale: Intermittent supply on the AB Road stretch; corroborated by pipeline-age records but alternate tanker supply available.

complaints.text: Water comes only once in two days near Geeta Bhawan
पानी का प्रेशर बहुत कम है सुबह
